languages.text: {n}Уралон встречает ваши слова угрюмой насмешкой.{/n} "Какая самонадеянность перед лицом фатума, Вольный Торговец. Я — слуга судьбы, {name}. Мое слово — эхо моего господина, а его приказ — закон для этой реальности".

traits.locale_text: {n}Уралон встречает ваши слова угрюмой насмешкой.{/n} "Какая самонадеянность перед лицом фатума, Вольный Торговец. Я — слуга судьбы, {name}. Мое слово — эхо моего господина, а его приказ — закон для этой реальности".
traits.speaker: DarkApostleMob

languages.text: {n}Uralon reacts to your words with a sullen sneer.{/n} "Such arrogance! You are staring kismet in the face, Rogue Trader. I am the servant of fate, {name}. My word echoes that of my master, and his command is law for this reality."

languages.text: {n}Uralon reagiert auf deine Worte mit einem mürrischen Grinsen.{/n} "Solche Arroganz! Du starrst dem Kismet ins Gesicht, Schurkenhändler. Ich bin der Diener des Schicksals, {name}. Mein Wort ist das Echo meines Meisters, und sein Befehl ist das Gesetz für diese Realität."
languages.original_text: {n}Uralon reacts to your words with a sullen sneer.{/n} "Such arrogance! You are staring kismet in the face, Rogue Trader. I am the servant of fate, {name}. My word echoes that of my master, and his command is law for this reality."

traits.locale_text: {n}Uralon reagiert auf deine Worte mit einem mürrischen Grinsen.{/n} "Solche Arroganz! Du starrst dem Kismet ins Gesicht, Schurkenhändler. Ich bin der Diener des Schicksals, {name}. Mein Wort ist das Echo meines Meisters, und sein Befehl ist das Gesetz für diese Realität."

languages.text: {n}Uralon réagit à vos paroles par un rictus maussade.{/n} "Quelle arrogance ! Vous regardez le destin en face, Rogue Trader. Je suis le serviteur du destin, {name}. Ma parole fait écho à celle de mon maître, et son commandement est la loi de cette réalité."
languages.original_text: {n}Uralon reacts to your words with a sullen sneer.{/n} "Such arrogance! You are staring kismet in the face, Rogue Trader. I am the servant of fate, {name}. My word echoes that of my master, and his command is law for this reality."

traits.locale_text: {n}Uralon réagit à vos paroles par un rictus maussade.{/n} "Quelle arrogance ! Vous regardez le destin en face, Rogue Trader. Je suis le serviteur du destin, {name}. Ma parole fait écho à celle de mon maître, et son commandement est la loi de cette réalité."

languages.text: {n}Uralon reacciona a tus palabras con una mueca hosca.{/n} "¡Qué arrogancia! Estás mirando al destino a la cara, Rogue Trader. Soy el siervo del destino, {name}. Mi palabra hace eco de la de mi maestro, y su mandato es ley para esta realidad".
languages.original_text: {n}Uralon reacts to your words with a sullen sneer.{/n} "Such arrogance! You are staring kismet in the face, Rogue Trader. I am the servant of fate, {name}. My word echoes that of my master, and his command is law for this reality."

traits.locale_text: {n}Uralon reacciona a tus palabras con una mueca hosca.{/n} "¡Qué arrogancia! Estás mirando al destino a la cara, Rogue Trader. Soy el siervo del destino, {name}. Mi palabra hace eco de la de mi maestro, y su mandato es ley para esta realidad".

languages.text: {n}Uralon sözlerine asık suratlı bir alaycılıkla karşılık veriyor.{/n} "Bu ne küstahlık! Kısmetin yüzüne bakıyorsun, Haydut Tüccar. Ben kaderin hizmetkârıyım, {name}. Benim sözlerim efendimin sözlerini yansıtır ve onun emirleri bu gerçeklik için kanundur."
languages.original_text: {n}Uralon reacts to your words with a sullen sneer.{/n} "Such arrogance! You are staring kismet in the face, Rogue Trader. I am the servant of fate, {name}. My word echoes that of my master, and his command is law for this reality."

traits.locale_text: {n}Uralon sözlerine asık suratlı bir alaycılıkla karşılık veriyor.{/n} "Bu ne küstahlık! Kısmetin yüzüne bakıyorsun, Haydut Tüccar. Ben kaderin hizmetkârıyım, {name}. Benim sözlerim efendimin sözlerini yansıtır ve onun emirleri bu gerçeklik için kanundur."
